title: First Steps
description: Displays a title when entering structures
body:
## Displays a title when entering a structure.Works both Single and Multi!
![demo](https://i.ibb.co/rGtjpyYc/2.gif)
<details>
<summary>Works with these mods</summary>


    
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)  
- [qraftyfied: STRUCTURES](https://modrinth.com/mod/qraftyfied)
- [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric)
- [BiomesOPlenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures)
- [Structory](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory)
- [AdditionalStructures](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures)
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns)  
- [Trek](https://modrinth.com/mod/trek)
</details>


**Lightweight** – Minimal impact on game performance.


**Highly Customizable** – You can customize the title size, position, color, dimension color, mod prefix color, display duration, opacity, and text style (italic/bold) for each structure by editing the files inside the `lang` folder of the JAR. You can even customize the structure entry sound effects!
<details>
<summary>Languages</summary>

  
简体中文
English:US
Deutsch:DE
繁體中文（中國香港）
繁體中文（中國台灣）
한국어
日本語
Español
Português
Français
</details>  


Inspired by *[Traveler's Titles](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelers-titles)* and *[What Is This Structure?](https://modrinth.com/mod/wits)* 



**AI‑generated mod**:  
  1. I may not be able to solve every issue (though I'll try).  
  2. Compatibility with other mods may be limited.  
  3. **You are free to use, modify, and include it in your modpacks** (okay with the compatibility/performance caveats).


[![issues](https://img.shields.io/badge/issues-GitHub_Issues-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/xiao364/first-step-mod/issues)

---


## 进入某个结构时显示标题。正在测试多人!单人也可以正常用！
<details>
<summary>适用于以下模组：</summary>

  
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)  
- [qraftyfied: STRUCTURES](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)  
- [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric)  
- [BiomesOPlenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures)
- [Structory](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory)
- [AdditionalStructures](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures)
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns)   
- [Trek](https://modrinth.com/mod/trek)
</details>  


*建议一起用：[Modern UI（1.21.9+）](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernui-mc-mvus)[（其他版本）](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-ui/versions) 、[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)*


- **轻量化** – 对游戏性能影响小  
- **高度自定义** – 可以通过修改 JAR 文件内 `lang` 文件夹中的文件，来自定义每个结构的标题大小，位置，颜色、维度颜色以及模组前缀颜色，显示时长，不透明度，以及字体样式（斜体/加粗）。甚至还能自定义进入结构音效！  



灵感来自 *[Traveler's Titles](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelers-titles)* 和 *[What Is This Structure?](https://modrinth.com/mod/wits)* 

 

**AI 模组** – 请注意：
  1. 不一定能解决所有问题（会尽力）  
  2. 与其他模组的兼容性较差
  3. **你可以自由使用、修改并直接放入你的整合包中**（前提是能接受兼容和性能的不足）
